allow: Bash(node -e "const fr=require\(''''./src/i18n/fr.json''''\);const en=require\(''''./src/i18n/en.json''''\);const frKeys=Object.keys\(fr\);const enKeys=Object.keys\(en\);const missing=frKeys.filter\(k=>!enKeys.includes\(k\)\);console.log\(''''FR keys:'''',frKeys.length,''''EN keys:'''',enKeys.length,''''Missing in EN:'''',missing.join\('''', ''''\)||''''none''''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fr=require\(''./src/i18n/fr.json''\);const en=require\(''./src/i18n/en.json''\);const frKeys=Object.keys\(fr\);const enKeys=Object.keys\(en\);const missing=frKeys.filter\(function\(k\){return !enKeys.includes\(k\);}\);console.log\(''FR keys:'',frKeys.length,''EN keys:'',enKeys.length,''Missing in EN:'',missing.join\('', ''\)||''none''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fr=require\(''./src/i18n/fr.json''\); const en=require\(''./src/i18n/en.json''\); const fk=Object.keys\(fr\); const ek=Object.keys\(en\); console.log\(''FR:'',fk.length,''EN:'',ek.length\); const missing=fk.filter\(k=>!ek.includes\(k\)\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\(''Clés manquantes EN:'',missing.slice\(0,5\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {readFileSync}=require\(''fs''\); const fr=JSON.parse\(readFileSync\(''src/i18n/fr.json'',''utf8''\)\); const en=JSON.parse\(readFileSync\(''src/i18n/en.json'',''utf8''\)\); const fk=Object.keys\(fr\),ek=Object.keys\(en\); console.log\(''FR:'',fk.length,''| EN:'',ek.length\); const missingEn=fk.filter\(k=>!ek[k]\); const missingFr=ek.filter\(k=>!fr[k]\); if\(missingEn.length\) console.log\(''Absentes EN:'',missingEn.join\('', ''\)\); if\(missingFr.length\) console.log\(''Absentes FR:'',missingFr.join\('', ''\)\); if\(!missingEn.length&&!missingFr.length\) console.log\(''i18n synchro OK''\);")
